 {'date': '2026-03-19 14:05:23',
  'headline': 'How The Angi (ANGI) Investment Story Is Shifting With New '

  'publisher': 'Simply Wall St.',
  'summary': 'Angi’s fair value estimate was reset from $19.88 to about '

             '$18. As you read on, you will see what is driving these '
             'shifting...',
  'url': 'https://finance.yahoo.com/markets/stocks/articles/angi-angi-investment-story-shifting-140523274.html'},
 {'date': '2026-03-13 15:56:39',

  'headline': '3 Stocks Under $10 We Keep Off Our Radar',

 {'date': '2026-03-06 15:09:37',
  'headline': '3 Russell 2000 Stocks Walking a Fine Line',
  'publisher': 'StockStory',
  'summary': 'The Russell 2000 (^RUT) is packed with potential breakout '
